zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose Alice Stebbing於1536年1月1日出生在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，她的父親John Stebbing34歲，母親Alice Molly Barker32歲。她於1554年8月22日與Henry Adams在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年9月20日在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose Alice Stebbing于1536年1月1日出生在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛时，她的父亲John Stebbing34岁，母亲Alice Molly Barker32岁。她于1554年8月22日与Henry Adams在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年9月20日在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stebbing
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Steb, a boll, a trunk, and ing, originating from, meaning offspring of a trunk, a shoot, a branch

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Rose Alice Stebbing was born on 1 January 1536, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, her father, John Stebbing, was 34 and her mother, Alice Molly Barker, was 32. She married Henry Adams on 22 August 1554, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 September 1598, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Barton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose Alice Stebbing est née le 1 janvier 1536, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Stebbing, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Molly Barker, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Adams le 22 août 1554, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Barton, Somerset, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Alice Stebbing(이)가 1536년 1월 1일 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stebbing(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Molly Barker(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1554년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 Henry Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 9월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Alice Stebbing nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1536, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stebbing, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Molly Barker, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Adams em 22 de agosto de 1554, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1598, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Barton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose Alice Stebbing родилась 1 января 1536 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Stebbing было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Molly Barker, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Adams 22 августа 1554 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 сентября 1598 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности бартон, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Henry Adams el 22 de agosto de 1554, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1598, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Barton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
